prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace the Kafka consumer group rebalance protocol implementation across the Apache Kafka codebase. Find all Java source files in `apache/kafka` under `clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/clients/consumer/internals/` that define or implement a class containing `Rebalance` in the class name. For each file, identify the class name and its role in the rebalance protocol (coordinator, assignor, callback handler).
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
